name: torch-geometric
tagline: Reference guide for building graph neural networks with PyTorch Geometric — data structures, GNN layers, training patterns, scaling, and.
verdict: Well-scoped, accurate PyG reference with clear trigger/negative-trigger, concrete runnable code, a pitfalls section covering real failure modes, and bulk content offloaded to reference files. No security concerns found. Only nit: base install commands are unpinned for well-known packages (warning, not risk).

highlights.summary: `uv pip install torch_geometric` and `uv pip install torch` are unpinned; well-known official packages so not a fail, but no version pin given.
